titleStmt.title: SII 38.499: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 499. (A.R. No. 499 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Rājarāja III Year: [2]6+1st Karkaṭaka, śu. di. 3 Wednesday, Pūśam = 21st July 1232, provided the regnal year was 27.

summary.p: This inscription records that uḍaiyāṉ Mallan Śīyan alias Brahmādharāya Muttaraiyan of Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu sold his kāṇi of two mā, three kāṇi of wet land in Ūṟṟattūr to one of his soldiers (agampaḍiyār), uḍaiyān Śrutimān-nāyan Śōṟaṉ alias Iruṅkōḷaṉ (a resident) of Neṟkuḷam for 800 aṉṟāḍu-naṟkāśu. The seller also gave the sale deed to the buyer.

Śīyan Mallaṉ alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa Brahmādharāyaṉ, the accountant of the nāḍu, Kuṟichchiyūr-uḍaiyāṉ, Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Ūṟaiyāṇḍān alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira Piriyan and several others figure as signatories. Among the boundaries of the land sold a land owned by Kārāmbichcheṭṭu Rāmabhirāṉ Bhaṭṭar is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 26 tiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kaṟkaṭaka nāya(ā)ṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tirutiyaiyum putankiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrattunāḷ vaṭakarai I
rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnā(ṭa)ṭuṭai(ā)yaāṉ mallanciyanāṉa piramātarāyamuttaraiyanen Ennakampaṭiyāril neṟkuḷamuṭaiya curitimānṉāyancoṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉukku Enkāṇi
yāy nāṉ viṟkiṉṟa Ūṟṟattūr naṉceynilattu talai naṉcaiyil nān viṟkiṉṟa nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai pirāmaṇar civappotukkellaikkum niḷukkuḷa meṟkum teṉ
pāṟkellai kārāmpicceṭṭu Irāmapirāṉpaṭṭar nilattukku Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkum kalmatuḷukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai neṭumaraṇikuḷattu karaikkuk kiḻakkum cavaippotuvukkuk
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟke(ṟa)llai Aracanāyaṉār koyilukkum nantaiyāṟṟukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai naṭuvuṭ(p)pati nālaṭiyum vilaikkaṭiyumāṉa kolāl » 2mā tma Innila
m Iraṇṭu māmukkāṇiyum Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭunaṟkācu 8 100 Ikkācu Eṇṇūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaikcela va�
ṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ nāyaṉ coṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉukku mallaṉciyaṉāṉa piramātarāya muttaraiyaneṉ Innilam Iraṇṭu mā mukkāṇikkum Ikkācu Eṇṇū
ṟume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutipporuḷcela Olaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celaolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallātārākavum Innilattāl vanta potuvum po
taraivukaḷumNormal expression is potuvum potāriyummeṉokkina maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppe(o)ṟpaṭṭa pirāttikaḷum Uṭpaṭa vilaikkaṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇaicaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ nāyan co
ṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉukku mallaṉ ciyaṉāṉa piramātarāya muttaraiyaneṉ Ikkācu Eṇṇūṟuṅ kaikoṇṭu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ mallaṉ ciyaṉāṉa piramātarāya muttarai
yaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu cayanRead ciyanmallaṉāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa piramātarāyamuttaraiyaṉ cayiñāṉamaikku piramu�tarāyaRead piramātarāya muttaraiyaneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ nāṭṭukkaṇakku kuṟucci
yūruṭaiyāṉneḻuttu Aruḷicceytapaṭi Innilavilaippiramāṉa Icaivu tiṭṭu Eḻutineṉ nāṭṭuk kaṇa muṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Ūṟaiyāṇṭāṉāna nāṟpatteṇṇāyira
piriyāneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Uṭaiyār tūmāmaṇi nayiṉār koyilil civappirāmaṇa Ūṟaiyāṇṭāṉāṉa tāya �ya neḻuttu Ūṟṟattūr kaikkoḷaril celvaṉpiramātarāya mārāyan
lilk kāṇiuṭaiya Aḻiyātāṉ nampi cayiñānataṉmaikku pūcikku nampimār kovaṉ ciya(ā)n piḷḷaiyeṉ neḻuttu Uṭaiyār tūmāmaṇināyaṉār koyil tirumeykāIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.499 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
